sourceBoundary: reference/MATH1030/Practice Set 3_Matrix Algebra and Linear Equation System.pdf, questions 9-11
exclusions: Detailed symmetric and skew-symmetric transpose theory belongs to the transpose/symmetry video.
Block partitions and block arithmetic belong to 3.5 Block matrices.
Long products of row-operation matrices and invertibility consequences belong to later row-operation and invertibility notes.

segments.goal: Frame special matrices as families whose zero pattern predicts algebra before computation.
beats: Display the family map: diagonal, triangular, identity, zero, and elementary.
Emphasize that a matrix may belong to more than one family.
segments.animation: family cards grouped as a map

segments.goal: Show that off-diagonal zeros define the family and that products remain diagonal.
beats: Mute all off-diagonal entries of a diagonal matrix.
Show a diagonal product with only diagonal entries surviving.
segments.animation: off-diagonal zero mask and product arrow

segments.goal: Make the below-diagonal zero pattern of upper triangular matrices visible.
beats: Highlight the main diagonal and mute entries below it.
Show that an upper-triangular product keeps zeros below the diagonal.
segments.animation: upper triangular matrix and upper triangular product

segments.goal: Connect identity matrices to diagonal matrices and the multiplication identity law.
beats: Show I as a diagonal matrix with all diagonal entries equal to 1.
Show A times I returning A.

segments.goal: Show that applying one row operation to I creates an elementary matrix.
beats: Start from I_3.
Display row swap, row scaling, and row-addition examples.
mathBlocks: E = one elementary row operation applied to I
segments.animation: I_3 branching into three elementary matrices

segments.goal: Close with the row/column-operation bridge and point back to the live widgets.
beats: Show EA changing rows and AE changing columns.
Use the family checker for recognition and the row stepper for operation chains.

segments.goal: 把特殊矩陣理解為可由零元素圖案預測代數行為的家族。
beats: 顯示對角、三角、單位、零矩陣與初等矩陣的家族地圖。
指出同一矩陣可以同時屬於多個家族。
mathBlocks: 先認家族 -> 預測行為

segments.goal: 顯示非對角零元素如何定義家族，以及對角乘積仍為對角。
beats: 淡化對角矩陣的所有非對角元素。
顯示兩個對角矩陣相乘後只有對角元素保留。
segments.animation: 非對角零元素遮罩與乘積箭頭

segments.goal: 讓上三角矩陣對角線下方全為零的圖案變得可見。
beats: 標示主對角線，淡化其下方元素。
顯示上三角乘積仍在下方保留零元素。
mathBlocks: 上三角 * 上三角 = 上三角
segments.animation: 上三角矩陣與上三角乘積

segments.goal: 把單位矩陣連到對角矩陣與乘法中的單位律。
beats: 顯示 I 是對角線全為 1 的對角矩陣。
顯示 A 乘 I 後仍回到 A。

segments.goal: 顯示對 I 做一次行變換即可得到初等矩陣。
beats: 由 I_3 開始。
顯示交換行、縮放行與加上某行倍數的例子。
mathBlocks: E = 對 I 做一次初等行變換
segments.animation: I_3 分支成三個初等矩陣

segments.goal: 用行/列變換橋樑收束，並連回頁面中的互動工具。
beats: 顯示 EA 改變行，而 AE 改變列。
用分類工具做識別，再用行化簡步驟器看操作鏈。

segments.goal: 把特殊矩阵理解为可由零元素图案预测代数行为的家族。
beats: 显示对角、三角、单位、零矩阵与初等矩阵的家族地图。
指出同一矩阵可以同时属于多个家族。
mathBlocks: 先认家族 -> 预测行为

segments.goal: 显示非对角零元素如何定义家族，以及对角乘积仍为对角。
beats: 淡化对角矩阵的所有非对角元素。
显示两个对角矩阵相乘后只有对角元素保留。
segments.animation: 非对角零元素遮罩与乘积箭头

segments.goal: 让上三角矩阵对角线下方全为零的图案变得可见。
beats: 标示主对角线，淡化其下方元素。
显示上三角乘积仍在下方保留零元素。
mathBlocks: 上三角 * 上三角 = 上三角
segments.animation: 上三角矩阵与上三角乘积

segments.goal: 把单位矩阵连到对角矩阵与乘法中的单位律。
beats: 显示 I 是对角线上全为 1 的对角矩阵。
显示 A 乘 I 后仍回到 A。

segments.goal: 显示对 I 做一次行变换即可得到初等矩阵。
beats: 由 I_3 开始。
显示交换行、缩放行与加上某行倍数的例子。
mathBlocks: E = 对 I 做一次初等行变换
segments.animation: I_3 分支成三个初等矩阵

segments.goal: 用行/列变换桥梁收束，并连回页面中的互动工具。
beats: 显示 EA 改变行，而 AE 改变列。
用分类工具做识别，再用行化简步骤器看操作链。
